---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea, enhancement, or architectural expansion for Energy Core.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm frustrated when...").

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Industrial/ROI Impact
Describe how this new feature improves asset tracking, data notarization, or financial compliance for utility-scale deployment.
